commands.name: spec
commands.description:
Commands for working with OpenAPI specification 
files.

commands.name: validate

options.name: --files
options.description:
Explicit comma-separated list of files to validate as
multi-part (overrides auto-discovery).

options.name: --multi-part
options.description:
Enable multi-part mode: auto-discover and merge part
files before validation.

options.name: --no-strict
options.description:
Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming
convention checks).

options.name: --specification
options.description:
Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or
JSON).

commands.description:
Validate an OpenAPI specification file (strict mode by 
default).

commands.name: merge

options.name: --files
options.description:
Explicit comma-separated list of files to merge
(overrides auto-discovery).

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: yaml (default) or json.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output file path for the merged
specification.

options.name: --preview
options.description: Preview merged output without writing file.

options.name: --specification
options.description:
Path to the base OpenAPI specification file
(auto-discovers part files by naming convention).

options.name: --strategy
options.description:
Merge strategy for duplicates: ErrorOnDuplicate
(default), MergeIfIdentical, AppendUnique, FirstWins, LastWins.

options.name: --validate
options.description:
Validate the merged specification after
merging.

commands.description:
Merge multiple OpenAPI specification files into 
one.

commands.name: split

options.name: --extract-common
options.description: Extract shared schemas to a Common file.

options.name: --min-operations
options.description:
Minimum operations per part file (smaller groups merged
into Other).

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for the split files.

options.name: --pattern
options.description:
File naming pattern. Default:
{base}_{part}.yaml

options.name: --preview
options.description: Preview split without writing files.

options.name: --specification
options.description:
Path to the OpenAPI specification file to
split.

options.name: --strategy
options.description:
Split strategy: ByTag (default), ByPathSegment, or
ByDomain.

commands.description:
Split an OpenAPI specification file into multiple part 
files.

commands.name: generate
commands.description:
Commands for generating code from OpenAPI 
specifications.

commands.name: client

options.name: --client-namespace
options.description:
Override the client namespace (written to marker
file).

options.name: --client-project
options.description: Override the client project name.

options.name: --client-suffix
options.description:
Suffix for the HTTP client class name (default:
'Client').

options.name: --generation-mode
options.description:
Client generation mode: TypedClient or
EndpointPerOperation.

options.name: --include-deprecated
options.description:
Include deprecated operations and schemas in generated
code.

options.name: --name
options.description:
Name of the project (e.g.,
'Demo.Api.Contracts').

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Custom namespace prefix for generated code (auto-detected
from project name if not specified).

options.name: --no-oauth
options.description:
Disable OAuth2 token management generation even when
OAuth2 security is detected.

options.name: --no-strict
options.description:
Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming
convention checks).

options.name: --options
options.description:
Path to ApiGeneratorOptions.json file (optional,
auto-discovered if not specified).

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path to the output directory for the generated
project.

options.name: --report
options.description:
Generate a .generation-report.md file in the output
directory.

options.name: --specification
options.description:
Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or
JSON).

commands.description:
Generate a client project from an OpenAPI specification 
(strict validation by default).

commands.name: server

options.name: --aspire
options.description:
Create an Aspire AppHost project for
orchestration.

options.name: --contracts-namespace
options.description:
Override the contracts namespace (written to marker
file).

options.name: --contracts-project
options.description: Override the contracts project name.

options.name: --default-api-version
options.description: Default API version (e.g., '1.0').

options.name: --domain-namespace
options.description:
Override the domain namespace (written to marker
file).

options.name: --domain-output
options.description:
Output path for domain handler scaffolds
(TwoProjects/ThreeProjects mode only).

options.name: --domain-project
options.description:
Override the domain project name
(TwoProjects/ThreeProjects mode only).

options.name: --handler-suffix
options.description:
Suffix for handler class names (default:
'Handler').

options.name: --host-namespace
options.description: Override the host namespace.

options.name: --host-project
options.description:
Override the host project name (ThreeProjects mode
only).

options.name: --host-ui
options.description:
API documentation UI: None, Swagger, or Scalar
(default).

options.name: --host-ui-mode
options.description:
When to enable host UI: DevelopmentOnly (default) or
Always.

options.name: --include-deprecated
options.description:
Include deprecated operations and schemas in generated
code.

options.name: --name
options.description:
Name of the project (e.g.,
'Demo.Api.Contracts').

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Custom namespace prefix for generated code (auto-detected
from project name if not specified).

options.name: --no-coding-rules
options.description:
Skip adding ATC coding rules updater files (added by
default).

options.name: --no-strict
options.description:
Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming
convention checks).

options.name: --options
options.description:
Path to ApiGeneratorOptions.json file (optional,
auto-discovered if not specified).

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path to the output directory for the generated
project.

options.name: --project-structure
options.description:
Project structure: SingleProject (1 project), TwoProjects
(Host+Contracts, Domain), or ThreeProjects (3 projects, default).

options.name: --report
options.description:
Generate a .generation-report.md file in the output
directory.

options.name: --specification
options.description:
Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or
JSON).

options.name: --stub-implementation
options.description:
Stub implementation type: throw-not-implemented,
error-501, or default-value.

options.name: --sub-folder-strategy
options.description:
Sub-folder organization strategy: None, FirstPathSegment,
or OpenApiTag.

options.name: --versioning-strategy
options.description:
API versioning strategy: None, QueryString, Header,
UrlSegment, or Combined.

commands.description:
Generate server contracts and domain handler scaffolds from 
an OpenAPI specification.
examples: generate server -s api.yaml -o output/MyApp.Api.Contracts -n MyApp.Api.Contracts --versioning-strategy UrlSegment

commands.name: options
commands.description:
Commands for managing ApiGeneratorOptions.json configuration 
files.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing file if it exists.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path to the directory or file for the options
file.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing file if it exists.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path to the directory or file for the options
file.

commands.name: migrate
commands.description:
Commands for migrating old CLI-generated projects to source 
generators.

commands.name: validate

options.name: --output-report
options.description: Save the validation report to a JSON file.

options.name: --solution
options.description:
Path to the solution file (.sln/.slnx) or root directory
of the project to migrate.

options.name: --spec
options.description:
Path to the OpenAPI specification file (.yaml/.yml/.json)
used to generate the API.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Show detailed validation output including all detected
files and configurations.

commands.description:
Validate an old-generated API project for migration to source
generators.

commands.name: execute

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Preview changes without executing. Shows what would be
modified, created, or deleted.

options.name: --force
options.description:
Skip confirmation prompts (git status check, upgrade
confirmations).

options.name: --solution
options.description:
Path to the solution file (.sln/.slnx) or root directory
of the project to migrate.

options.name: --spec
options.description:
Path to the OpenAPI specification file (.yaml/.yml/.json)
used to generate the API.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show detailed output during migration.

commands.description:
Execute migration from old CLI-generated API to source 
generators.
